asset_type: TaraHome technical blog cover, landscape composition for 16:10 hero and 16:9 card crops
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: TaraHome technical blog cover image, landscape composition designed to survive a centered 16:10 article-card crop
Primary request: a credible homeowner troubleshooting a local smart-home network after Matter-over-Thread devices have gone offline
Scene/backdrop: warm lived-in residential living room with an oak media console, softly textured plaster wall, linen upholstery, a leafy plant, and restrained dark-green books or ceramic accents
Subject: one adult homeowner crouched naturally beside the console, calmly checking the Ethernet connection and status lights on a compact local home-automation computer and an ordinary home router; a small USB radio adapter is visible but not emphasized; in the same room, one practical table lamp is lit and a small wall sensor and smart plug are visible as real installed objects
Style/medium: clean photorealistic editorial lifestyle photography, candid and practical, realistic skin and fabric texture, believable everyday electronics, not a staged catalog render
Composition/framing: wide eye-level three-quarter view, main action and devices kept inside the central safe area for a 16:10 crop, readable at small article-card size, no need for text space
Lighting/mood: soft natural morning window light mixed with warm lamp light, calm problem-solving mood
Color palette: warm wood, cream, muted linen, restrained Tara dark-green accents
Materials/textures: visible oak grain, matte plaster, woven fabric, normal cable texture, subtle everyday wear
Constraints: no text, no logos, no trademarks, no brand-specific product styling, no visible phone or computer UI, no title poster, no diagram, no fake chart or graph, no decorative routing/network/path lines, no glowing connection trails, no translucent panels, no inset frames, no floating UI cards, no progress bars, no badges, no watermark
Avoid: generic AI-looking smart-home diagram, repeated beige device illustration, futuristic hardware, invented branded devices, excessive green lighting, visual clutter, dramatic failure effects
